{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017112135563F3EA22669E30B3D"}"},"total":1576},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7407691626170745662","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到一半了，按耐不住，来个评论，太好看了[送心]，放下脑子看，感觉真的好看，挺顺的，没有虐的剧情，不会像别的，看的心肌梗塞，这种爽文有点爽[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724740951,"group_id":"7371762257388112958","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"感觉活着好累，躺下了，你们随意","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+OejbfO8OTKOY9FMp8oGeNsriWzZeiwS5sWv1jn0DkH","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/90b2ff8faf124582a2525af6d77bc39d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529568&x-signature=Wf%2FhD5ECeS5eqCAORv%2FyRbaIuW8%3D","user_id":"4217349091626372","user_name":"白有常"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4217349091626372","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7371762257388112958","book_info":{"abstract":"【游戏降临现实+无CP+重生+爽文】
诡异的黑色水晶球突然遍布全球各地，一款名为⌈命运⌋的真人游戏降临蓝星。
数以亿计的人类被强制成为玩家，卷进游戏。
从此，游戏融入现实，原有的秩序开始崩坏重建。
.....
姜楠意外重返五年前⌈命运⌋降临的这一天。
只是上辈子的战士职业，这次竟变成了牧师....
习惯暴力输出的姜楠，一不小心成为了全网第一暴牧。
至此，游戏公告上，姜楠成为了常客，动不动就是全网播报。
这个首杀，那个首杀
这个称号，那个称号
拿到手软。
众玩家从最初的震惊到最后的习以为常。
“不过，你可是奶妈牧师，不好好待在后方加血，比一个战士还暴力，像话吗！”
刚干掉一群人、顶着一串红名的姜楠回头：“你在说我？”
众玩家秒怂：“....不敢不敢，大佬，您开心就好。”
【无CP是指女主不爱别人，只一心变强，但不妨碍别人喜欢女主】
.....
【后期游戏场景的描写不多，游戏一步步融入现实，所以主要还是在现实，如果喜欢看打怪描写的宝子们可能会不喜欢，你们斟酌选择阅读，谢谢】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2odc9f32c6527419fe5ce310b5921fc3d4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"哆来咪发多","author_id":"","book_id":"7371762257388112958","book_name":"游戏降临，首杀公告刷屏全网！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#204068","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7371763087440888382","read_count":"18078","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"518793"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"232","tags":"游戏体育,重生,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f5a7a7de3139edd36a9cb76196ff34b2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181881&x-signature=%2BNVE1%2BSx7eAUUEgsBQQRZDC8Hkg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3589225506153536","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"118"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017112135563F3EA22669E30B3D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":27166,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3570},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7394123513550930713","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书里有讨厌的男女配角（女主父亲和女主继母继妹）同时也有正面的男配（沈乐天）女配（文绮悦乔蔓蔓）喜欢全文无恶毒女配甚至觉得有恶毒女配就是雌竞的不建议看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721581172,"group_id":"7371762257388112958","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1165125092910436"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7371762257388112958","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"66"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7394123671679763225","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前看到六十章，女主不圣母，全服首杀称号全都在女主手里，真·爽文女主。女主前期隐藏身份，同时疯狂薅别人羊毛提升自己，实力直接倍杀别人，受了苦不忍着，虽是独狼但有小弟，且会和官方合作，好看！ps:会有人因为女主的强大而爱慕女主！喜欢看全文都是纯战友情的不建议来，因为爱慕者是官方的人，女主会和官方的人交集较多（包括不爱慕女主的人）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721580780,"group_id":"7371762257388112958","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱看升级流，爱看爽文🥰","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N52W/JkvGI4rCeNRLzp75eM/j1M9+GY7zfF+uMsSbx8/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/678b7dd254894e6a93f8996858f66723~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536948&x-signature=zIQpKvu3wfYo7e0J5az98mxQBeA%3D","user_id":"1165125092910436","user_name":"苏木不苏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1165125092910436","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7371762257388112958","book_info":{"abstract":"【游戏降临现实+无CP+重生+爽文】
